tool.name: ssrf_tester
tool.description: Test for SSRF (Server-Side Request Forgery) vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test basic SSRF with callback verification - Test access to cloud metadata endpoints (AWS, GCP, Azure) - Test access to internal services (Docker, Redis, etc.) - Generate SSRF payloads with bypass techniques - Test specific endpoints with custom payloads

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - test_basic: Test basic SSRF with callback - test_cloud_metadata: Test access to cloud metadata endpoints - test_internal: Test access to internal services - generate_payload: Generate SSRF payload - test_endpoint: Test specific endpoint with payload

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Base URL for testing. Required for test_* actions.

parameter.name: payload_type
parameter.description: Type of payload: aws_metadata, gcp_metadata, azure_metadata, localhost, internal_network, custom

parameter.name: callback_url
parameter.description: Callback URL for OOB verification. Required for test_basic.

tool.examples:
# Test basic SSRF
test_basic https://example.com/fetch https://callback.com
# Test cloud metadata access
test_cloud_metadata https://example.com/fetch
# Generate payload
generate_payload aws_metadata
